name: Volvo. AB ser. B SO 1(208)
summary: Volvo. AB ser. B SO 1(208) represents a put option on Volvo AB series B shares with a strike price of 208 SEK. A put option gives the holder the right, but not the obligation, to sell Volvo AB series B shares at the strike price before the expiration date. Volvo AB is a Swedish manufacturer of trucks, buses, construction equipment, and marine and industrial engines.
